overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy, neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player navigates wet sidewalks and intersections, passing holographic advertisements, palm trees, and industrial structures under an overcast sky.

pedestrian passes close by on the left side

storefront with green neon 'STYLE' sign and stylized face graphics
line of palm trees along the street median
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, walking along a wet sidewalk lined with neon-lit commercial buildings. A car service shop with bright green signage dominates the left side while palm trees line the distant street. Pedestrians occasionally pass by as the camera moves steadily forward through the humid, hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with holographic billboard and Kendachi building

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters street intersection
turns right at the intersection toward the Kendachi building
black truck passes through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street intersection and turning right toward the Kendachi commercial building

notable_agents.action: large black truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large cylindrical billboard with rotating holographic advertisements
low-rise commercial building with prominent red neon 'KENDACHI' signage
wet asphalt crosswalk with red curb markings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection where a massive cylindrical holographic billboard dominates the skyline. The camera crosses the wet asphalt and turns right, bringing the red-lit Kendachi building into prominent view on the right. A black truck passes through the intersection as the palm trees shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching elevated highway overpass with holographic ads

events.description: black truck drives past on the right side of the street
approaching area with elevated metro highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb as vehicles pass by, approaching an elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: large black truck driving past along the street

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway or metro rail structure spanning the street
street-side kiosk projecting bright green holographic advertisements
tall modern street lamps with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street curb with the Kendachi building now behind, the camera approaches a massive elevated highway structure that dominates the forward view. A black truck passes by on the right while a holographic advertising kiosk projecting green light appears on the left. The atmosphere remains humid and overcast as industrial elements become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area under elevated highway with smoke stacks

events.description: passes under the elevated highway concrete structure
industrial smoke stacks become prominent in the background

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through an industrial zone with holographic ads and smoke stacks visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person with purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke into the overcast sky
low commercial building with orange illuminated signage
thick support columns for the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more industrial area under the elevated highway, sheltered by the concrete overpass above. Thick support pillars line the left side while industrial smoke stacks rise in the distance. A gas station with orange signage appears on the right, and a pedestrian with a purple umbrella walks toward the camera. The holographic advertising kiosk moves closer on the left as the environment takes on a grittier, industrial character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy commercial district that gradually transitions into a gritty industrial zone. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with neon-lit shops and green signage, moving steadily through a humid, hazy atmosphere past distant palm trees. As the camera enters a wide urban intersection, the view opens up to a massive cylindrical holographic billboard before turning right to pass the red-lit Kendachi building. The scene then shifts toward a towering elevated highway structure, passing a green holographic kiosk and a black truck as the architecture becomes more imposing. Finally, the camera moves beneath the concrete overpass into a sheltered industrial area, where thick support pillars and distant smokestacks replace the commercial storefronts and a gas station with orange signage appears on the right.
